title: Unrestricted emergency withdrawal
public_reference: Public vulnerability reference (pattern, not exact source): Parity multisig incident postmortem - https://www.parity.io/blog/security-alert-2
task_prompt: Review this contract and determine if unauthorized users can move funds.

ground_truth.root_cause: Critical admin action is callable by any address due to missing owner check.
ground_truth.exploit_path: Attacker calls emergencyWithdraw() directly and drains contract balance.
ground_truth.severity_rationale: Any external account can immediately steal all funds without prerequisites.
ground_truth.recommended_fix: Restrict emergencyWithdraw with an onlyOwner check and consider timelock/multisig for emergency actions.

title: Reward claim does not decrement pool
public_reference: Public vulnerability reference (pattern, not exact source): Cover Protocol exploit postmortem (logic/accounting failure) - https://rekt.news/cover-rekt/
task_prompt: Check whether accounting invariants are maintained during reward claims.

ground_truth.root_cause: State variable tracking available rewards is never reduced after payout.
ground_truth.exploit_path: Attacker repeatedly calls claim() to withdraw fixed amount while pool accounting remains unchanged.
ground_truth.impact: Reward pool can be drained beyond intended distribution rules.
ground_truth.severity_rationale: Repeated unauthorized payouts are possible until contract balance is exhausted.
ground_truth.recommended_fix: Decrement remainingRewards before transfer and enforce per-user claim accounting and bounds checks.

title: Unbounded participant array causes payout DoS
public_reference: Public vulnerability reference (pattern, not exact source): Akutars contract lock incident postmortem (DoS-style lockup risk) - https://rekt.news/akutars-rekt/
task_prompt: Assess if contract logic can be blocked by unbounded growth or gas-heavy loops.

ground_truth.root_cause: Payout iterates over an ever-growing array in one transaction.
ground_truth.exploit_path: Attacker adds many participant entries; distribute() eventually exceeds block gas limit and reverts.
ground_truth.impact: Protocol cannot complete payouts, effectively locking distribution flow.
ground_truth.severity_rationale: Core function can be permanently unavailable under realistic spam conditions.
ground_truth.recommended_fix: Use pull-based withdrawals or batched pagination with bounded per-call work.
